picks.quote: Luana Santos is probably going to be one of the more popular underdogs of the week... she should win the rounds and if she wins the rounds, wins the fight.

He's the best fighter, if not second best fighter on the card... I don't see how you're not lock buttoning in Luana Santos here... I'm going to go with Cee Rod... I'm going to go with Cheyanne Vlismas.
I think Cheo Kelly is very live to get that first round finish here. Shabazyan is a kind of a one-dimensional grappler.
I think he's a good play at 9,000.
If you're running 100 lineups, I would recommend maybe running like 50-50 split on that fight... this is the ultimate pivot.
